description: EV growth, diesel decline, fuel mix, EV leasing, and electric brand/model leaders for registered Danish passenger cars.

targets.query: FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS registered_cars = COUNT(*)
FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS electric_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El"

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS total_cars = COUNT(*), electric_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El" | EVAL ev_share = 1.0 * electric_cars / total_cars | KEEP ev_share

panels.title: EV Share of Registered Passenger Cars

targets.query: FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS diesel_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Diesel"

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _drivkraft_primaer == "El" | STATS total_evs = COUNT(*), leased_evs = COUNT(*) WHERE LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL | EVAL leased_ev_share = 1.0 * leased_evs / total_evs | KEEP leased_ev_share

panels.title: EV Leasing Rate (% of EVs Leased)

targets.query: FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _drivkraft_primaer == "El" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} | EVAL year_date = TO_DATETIME(CONCAT(TO_STRING(_foerste_registrering_aar), "-01-01")) | STATS electric_cars = COUNT(*) BY year_date | SORT year_date ASC

panels.title: EV Registrations by First Registration Year

targets.query: FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} AND _drivkraft_primaer IS NOT NULL | EVAL decade = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar < 1980, "Before 1980", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1990, "1980s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2000, "1990s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010, "2000s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2020, "2010s", "2020s") | STATS cars = COUNT(*) BY decade, fuel = _drivkraft_primaer | SORT decade ASC, cars DESC | LIMIT 80

panels.title: Fuel Mix by First Registration Decade

targets.query: FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} | EVAL year_date = TO_DATETIME(CONCAT(TO_STRING(_foerste_registrering_aar), "-01-01")) | STATS total = COUNT(*), evs = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El", diesels = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Diesel" BY year_date | EVAL ev_share_pct = ROUND(evs * 100.0 / total, 1), diesel_share_pct = ROUND(diesels * 100.0 / total, 1) | KEEP year_date, ev_share_pct, diesel_share_pct | SORT year_date ASC

panels.title: EV and Diesel Share by Year

targets.query: FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KarrosseriTypeStruktur.KarrosseriTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL | STATS total = COUNT(*), electric = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El" BY body_style = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KarrosseriTypeStruktur.KarrosseriTypeNavn.keyword | EVAL ev_share_pct = ROUND(electric * 100.0 / total, 1) | WHERE total >= 1000 | SORT ev_share_pct DESC | LIMIT 15

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS total_cars = COUNT(*), ev_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El" BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE total_cars >= 500 AND ev_cars >= 50 AND brand IS NOT NULL | EVAL ev_share_pct = ROUND(ev_cars * 100.0 / total_cars, 1) | SORT ev_cars DESC | LIMIT 25

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _drivkraft_primaer == "El" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Model.KoeretoejModelTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL | STATS electric_cars = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword, model = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Model.KoeretoejModelTypeNavn.keyword | SORT electric_cars DESC | LIMIT 25

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _drivkraft_primaer == "El" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL | STATS ev_cars = COUNT(*), leased_evs = COUNT(*) WHERE LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE ev_cars >= 100 | EVAL leased_ev_share_pct = ROUND(leased_evs * 100.0 / ev_cars, 1) | SORT leased_evs DESC | LIMIT 25

title: DMR Electrification & Fuel Transition
